name: Hold Jinn Electronics Co.,Ltd.
summary: Hold Jinn Electronics Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells electronic parts and materials. It offers SMD transformer wire racks, bakelite transformer wire racks, plastic transformer wire racks, plastic bakelite engineering products, intelligent parking equipment, artificial intelligence algorithms, and smart parking equipment, as well as integrated chip design services. The company also engages in the tourism business. Hold Jinn Electronics Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1980 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.
